description: Extracts the triangle side lengths from the user query text and determines if a z-coordinate is needed

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The complete user query text containing the triangle side length values to be extracted

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string containing the function definitions to understand parameter requirements

output.description: Returns extracted triangle dimensions as: {"x": 4, "y": 5, "z": 0} where x and y are the two side lengths mentioned in the query, and z defaults to 0 for 2D hypotenuse calculations

workflow_spec.name: Hypotenuse Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user queries to extract parameters for the math.hypot function and generates the appropriate function call JSON
